articles.contents:
Home
          About
          ☰
          
          
      
        
          
            Longxiang Wu
          
          
            
              Hi! 👋 I am a data scientist
              who helps insurance companies do customers profiling. I
              love wrangling, modeling, and visualizing data, and
              helping others do the same.
